memory.summary: My study plan just got bumped by a cohort_3 lunch invite. Since relationships are my top priority, I'll probably skip the analysis and join them instead.

desires: Ensure cohort_3 leaves me feeling genuinely included, not just skipped over for a task I can't complete anyway.
Get enough rest tonight so I don't collapse into the assignment analysis tomorrow despite my sleep debt.
Make sure the team knows I'm prioritizing this social connection because it matters to me, not because I'm avoiding work.

goals.description: Accept the lunch invitation from cohort_3 immediately and communicate clearly that my presence is a priority, not an avoidance tactic.
goals.rationale: My value system weights relationships (0.5) above task outcomes; ignoring this social cue would violate my core need for genuine inclusion. I must assertively claim this time to protect my trust with them.

goals.description: Schedule a 60-minute meal block in my calendar for today and mentally commit to ending work by then to prevent burnout.
goals.rationale: With only 2 hours of sleep debt and high stress, maintaining physical stamina is non-negotiable for future productivity. This aligns with my deliberate planning horizon and health values.

goals.description: Reschedule the 'finish assignment analysis' task to post-lunch or tomorrow morning if the team dynamic shifts.
goals.rationale: I am renegotiating my direct deadline because the current plan conflicts with a high-value relationship event. Dropping this specific goal now preserves my long-term well-being and ensures I can return to it effectively later.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizing relationships (0.5 weight) over task completion; ignoring the invite violates my core need for inclusion. I must assertively confirm attendance to protect trust with cohort_3 before rescheduling academic work.
